case_title: OVIEDO, GABRIEL et al VS WM. LAGOMARSINO AND CO.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WM. LAGOMARSINO AND CO. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT OVIEDO, GABRIEL OVIEDO, MARTHA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,925.30 FILED BY WM. LAGOMARSINO AND CO. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT OVIEDO, GABRIEL OVIEDO, MARTHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
CERT MAIL TO WM LAGOMARSIMO & CO. (OWNER) RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OVIEDO, GABRIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WM. LAGOMARSINO AND CO. $474.33 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $495.33, DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT TO MARTHA OVIEDO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,080.66 FILED BY OVIEDO, GABRIEL OVIEDO, MARTHA AS TO DEFENDANT WM. LAGOMARSINO AND CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-24-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-17-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
